body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42999", "cvss": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "An issue was discovered in OpenStack Keystone before 29.0.2. The Keystone RBAC policy enforcer in enforce_call unconditionally merges the raw JSON request body into the policy enforcement dictionary via policy_dict.update(json_input.copy()), overwriting trusted target data that was previously set from database lookups. Because flask.request.get_json is called with force=True, this works regardless of Content-Type or HTTP method. Any authenticated user can inject arbitrary policy target attributes (e.g., user_id, project_id) into the request body to bypass RBAC checks and perform unauthorized operations on resources belonging to other users or projects. This was introduced in commit 5ea59f52 (Rocky/14.0.0).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00329, "percentile": 0.24702}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2r23-2g6v-2m5f", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T17:44:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r23-2g6v-2m5f", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2r23-2g6v-2m5f"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42999"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T19:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T21:32:02Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42999", "https://bugs.launchpad.net/keystone/+bug/2148398", "https://security.openstack.org/ossa/OSSA-2026-015.html", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-42999", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2482840", "https://security.access.redhat.com/data/csaf/v2/vex/2026/cve-2026-42999.json", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/keystone/PYSEC-2026-600.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r23-2g6v-2m5f"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openstack/keystone", "summary": "OpenStack Keystone has an Authorization Bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T17:44:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r23-2g6v-2m5f", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "27.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "keystone"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 14.0.0, < 27.0.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "28.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "keystone"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 28.0.0, < 28.0.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "29.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "keystone"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 29.0.0, < 29.0.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
